╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                  CLAUDE API USAGE MONITOR – QUICK REFERENCE                     ║
║                         April 21, 2026 | 12:04 AM PST                           ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📊 BUDGET THRESHOLDS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Daily:   $5.00 budget   → Alert at $3.75 (75%)
Monthly: $155.00 budget → Alert at $116.25 (75%)

Rates:   Haiku Input  = $0.4 per 1M tokens
         Haiku Output = $1.2 per 1M tokens

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🚀 QUICK START
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣  SET TOKEN COUNTS
   export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=2500000
   export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=800000
   export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=45000000
   export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=12000000

2️⃣  RUN THE MONITOR
   python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/fetch-claude-usage-complete.py

3️⃣  CHECK RESULTS
   jq . ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage.json

4️⃣  VIEW COSTS
   jq '.cost_today, .cost_month' ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage.json

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⏰ CRON SETUP (OPTIONAL)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Add to crontab:
  0 * * * * /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage-monitor-cron.sh

Or with environment variables:
  0 * * * * export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=... && /path/to/script.sh

View crontab:
  crontab -l

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔔 WEBHOOK ALERTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Configure webhook:
  export WEBHOOK_MONITOR_URL="https://your-endpoint/alerts"

Alert triggers when:
  ✓ Daily cost > $3.75
  ✓ Monthly cost > $116.25

Alert payload includes:
  - timestamp
  - type: "claude_usage_alert"
  - severity: "warning"
  - reasons (array of threshold violations)
  - usage (current costs and tokens)
  - budgets (configured limits)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📁 FILE LOCATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Script:       ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/fetch-claude-usage-complete.py
Wrapper:      ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage-monitor-cron.sh
Output JSON:  ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage.json
Exec Log:     ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage-monitor.log
Setup Guide:  ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/CLAUDE-USAGE-MONITOR-SETUP.md

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📋 OUTPUT EXAMPLE (claude-usage.json)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{
  "timestamp": "2026-04-21T07:05:14Z",
  "status": "success",
  "budget_daily": 5.0,
  "budget_monthly": 155.0,
  "tokens_today": 3300000,
  "tokens_month": 57000000,
  "cost_today": 1.96,           ← Daily cost
  "cost_month": 32.4,           ← Monthly cost
  "input_tokens_today": 2500000,
  "output_tokens_today": 800000,
  "input_tokens_month": 45000000,
  "output_tokens_month": 12000000,
  "rates": {
    "haiku_input_per_1m": 0.4,
    "haiku_output_per_1m": 1.2
  }
}

If threshold exceeded, also includes:
  "alert": true,
  "alert_reasons": [
    "Daily cost $6.20 exceeds 75% threshold ($3.75)"
  ]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🧪 TEST RUNS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Test 1: Normal usage (no alert)
  cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=2500000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=800000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=45000000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=12000000
  python3 fetch-claude-usage-complete.py
  → Cost Today: $1.96 ✓

Test 2: Alert trigger
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=8000000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=2500000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=200000000
  export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_OUTPUT_TOKENS_MONTH=50000000
  python3 fetch-claude-usage-complete.py
  → Cost Today: $6.20 ⚠️ ALERT: Exceeds $3.75 threshold

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Problem: "No data in claude-usage.json"
  → Check env vars: echo $ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY
  → Set them: export ANTHROPIC_USAGE_INPUT_TOKENS_TODAY=0

Problem: "Cron not running"
  → Check logs: tail -f ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/claude-usage-monitor.log
  → Test manually: python3 fetch-claude-usage-complete.py
  → Verify cron: crontab -l

Problem: "Python not found"
  → Use full path: /usr/local/bin/python3 (or find it: which python3)
  → Update crontab with full path

Problem: "Webhook not triggering"
  → Test webhook: curl https://your-endpoint/alerts
  → Check alert status: jq '.alert' claude-usage.json
  → Verify threshold exceeded: cost_today > $3.75 or cost_month > $116.25

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📚 DOCUMENTATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Full guide:  CLAUDE-USAGE-MONITOR-SETUP.md
Script docs: fetch-claude-usage-complete.py (comments inside)
This ref:    CLAUDE-USAGE-QUICK-REF.txt

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ SETUP CHECKLIST
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

□ Scripts downloaded and executable
□ Environment variables configured (or cron wrapper with env)
□ Test run successful (check claude-usage.json)
□ Cron job added (optional but recommended)
□ Webhook URL configured (optional but recommended)
□ Read full documentation (CLAUDE-USAGE-MONITOR-SETUP.md)

Ready to deploy? All systems go! 🚀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
